instructions.message: Track all Vercel deployments, build status, and release history
AUTO-DEPLOY ON PUSH - Every git push to main branch triggers Vercel deployment. Log each deployment with: URL, status, duration, commit message
DEPLOYMENT STATUS - Track: Building, Ready, Error. Show build time. On error, show error message from Vercel
PRODUCTION ALIAS - Main deployment URL is command-center-v2-iota.vercel.app (always points to latest)

developments.message: Auto-deploy pipeline configured: GitHub push → Vercel build → Live
My Tickets section with QR code repository deployed
Instructions Modal with 📋 button deployed to all sections
Last Read timestamp feature deployed (proves I read prompts before acting)
My Tickets redesigned: Collapsed KPI row + expanded QR details

insights.message: Vercel auto-deploys on every git push to main branch
